package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_allocates_regex_or_template_per_request"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Regexp compilation inside Gin handlers instead of using precompiled patterns."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
